mapper.select:
SELECT sm.id, sm.parent_id, sm.menu_name, sm.permission_code, sm.menu_type, sm.menu_path, sm.menu_component, sm.menu_icon, sm.data_status, sm.active_name, sm.menu_order, sm.create_time FROM sys_menu sm WHERE sm.enabled = '1'
AND sm.menu_name LIKE CONCAT(#{req.menuName},'%')
AND sm.data_status = #{req.dataStatus}
ORDER BY sm.menu_order, sm.id

WITH RECURSIVE temp AS ( SELECT psm.id, psm.parent_id FROM sys_menu psm WHERE psm.enabled = '1' AND psm.parent_id = #{menuId} UNION ALL SELECT csm.id, csm.parent_id FROM sys_menu csm, temp tsm WHERE csm.enabled = '1' AND tsm.id = csm.parent_id ) SELECT id FROM temp
SELECT id FROM sys_menu sm WHERE sm.enabled = '1' START WITH sm.parent_id = #{menuId} CONNECT BY PRIOR sm.id = sm.parent_id

WITH RECURSIVE temp AS ( SELECT psm.id, psm.parent_id FROM sys_menu psm WHERE psm.parent_id = #{menuId} UNION ALL SELECT csm.id, csm.parent_id FROM sys_menu csm, temp tsm WHERE tsm.id = csm.parent_id ) SELECT id FROM temp
SELECT id FROM sys_menu sm START WITH sm.parent_id = #{menuId} CONNECT BY PRIOR sm.id = sm.parent_id
WITH RECURSIVE temp AS ( SELECT psm.* FROM sys_menu psm WHERE psm.id = #{menuId} UNION ALL SELECT csm.* FROM sys_menu csm, temp tsm WHERE tsm.id = csm.parent_id ) SELECT * FROM temp

SELECT sm.id, sm.parent_id, sm.menu_name, sm.permission_code, sm.menu_type, sm.menu_path, sm.menu_component, sm.menu_icon, sm.data_status, sm.menu_cached, sm.menu_show, sm.inner_link, sm.menu_open, sm.menu_order, sm.create_by, sm.create_time, sm.update_by, sm.update_time, sm.enabled FROM sys_menu sm START WITH sm.id = #{menuId} CONNECT BY PRIOR sm.id = sm.parent_id
